description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in white, with prominent sections clad in natural wood panels that add warmth and contrast. Large glass windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house includes a covered carport integrated into the structure, with a green lawn extending in front and along the side. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer windows and a solid wall enclosing the backyard. The overall layout emphasizes geometric forms and open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white walls, wood panel accents, large front windows, and an integrated carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, wood paneling, and the covered carport with a green lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid white wall, wood-clad upper story, and a private backyard area with grass.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main door, a mix of wood and white finishes, and a row of large windows along the ground floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid white wall, wood-clad upper story, and enclosed green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a single modern door, small steps, and is partially sheltered by the overhanging upper story.
